name: xforge
description: XForge Engineer MCP server: workflows, knowledge, doctor, policy, RBAC, tenants, packs, autoresearch + background daemon + 9 packs

tools.name: xforge_doctor
tools.description: Run XForge doctor. Returns exit code + last 4KB of stdout.

tools.name: xforge_knowledge_search
tools.description: Search knowledge base by keyword. Returns matching files with path, summary, keywords, lines.

tools.name: xforge_workflow_list
tools.description: List all W001-W015 workflows with id, name, version, description, state/transition counts.

tools.name: xforge_workflow_validate
tools.description: Validate a workflow YAML against workflow.schema.json + reachability + dead-end checks.

tools.name: xforge_workflow_run
tools.description: Execute a workflow FSM: load YAML, start at entrypoint, apply events, return history. Halts on terminal.

tools.name: xforge_rbac_check
tools.description: Check if a role can perform an action. Resolves role inheritance. Returns allowed/denied + level + reason.

tools.name: xforge_policy_check
tools.description: Evaluate a request against policy engine + RBAC. Returns allowed/denied/allowed_with_requirements.

tools.name: xforge_tenant_list
tools.description: List all tenants with id, name, knowledge path, file count, active state.

tools.name: xforge_tenant_create
tools.description: Create a new tenant with isolated knowledge/ and rag/ directories.

tools.name: xforge_tenant_use
tools.description: Switch the active tenant. Marks others inactive.

tools.name: xforge_pack_list
tools.description: List all marketplace packs with id, name, version, trust score, installed state.

tools.name: xforge_pack_install
tools.description: Install a pack: copy content from marketplace source to .xforge/knowledge/packs/ and update INDEX.json.

tools.name: xforge_pack_uninstall
tools.description: Remove an installed pack: delete files, remove from installed.json, remove from INDEX.json.

tools.name: xforge_autoresearch_run
tools.description: Run AutoResearch loop: measure xfs, run experiments (count, document-check, dedup, empty-dir), keep/discard, append to results.tsv.

iterations.description: Number of iterations (capped by config maxIterations, default 20)

tools.name: xforge_validate_all
tools.description: Aggregate health check: doctor + knowledge + workflows + xfs + tools + pytest in 1 call. Returns per-check ok + summary.

tools.name: xforge_autoresearch_run_mutate
tools.description: Real AutoResearch loop: copy knowledge to sandbox, run E*.py experiments, measure heuristic xfs, keep/discard, append to results.tsv. Safe (no git mutation).

tools.name: xforge_autoresearch_daemon
tools.description: Manage the AutoResearch background daemon (start/stop/status). Spawns a detached process that runs the mutate loop every 30s, writes state to .xforge/autoresearch/daemon-state.json.

iterationsPerTick.description: Number of mutate iterations per loop tick (default 7)

detach.description: Run as detached background process (default true)
